title: Embra
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:EmbraHeadshot.jpg]] |name=Embra |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]][[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 1|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 1]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's criminal empire]] *[[Hutt underground]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' **[[Sisar Runners]] *[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] {{C|unofficially}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Are you sure Embra's really a Hutt?''"
"''I'd hate to imagine anything ''else'' can smell like that...|[[Jozzel Moffet]] and [[Farquil Ban'n]]|}} '''Embra''' was a compassionate [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who could often be found at [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], with fellow Hutts [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] and [[Malta]]. He was known for wearing a [[Nose/Legends|nose]] ring through both nostrils. Embra based his operations on the jungle [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mazhar]]. ==Biography== Because of his kinder disposition that was not often seen in Hutts, he had a strong loyalty amongst his subjects. At some point before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Embra, along with Jabba and Malta, organized a hunt for the [[Yavin Vassilika]]. For his three contractors, Embra chose the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]], [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]], and [[Sardu Sallowe]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], after narrowly escaping a [[Death/Legends|death]] sentence by the invaders, Embra led a resistance group against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] known as the [[Sisar Runners]]. Near the end of the war, he aided the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. {{RPGseed}} During the Vong War, Embra had his headquarters on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. As punishment for the Hutts' betrayal, group of Vong warriors were sent to attack the resistance. {{Endgame}} ==Behind the scenes== Embra appears in the comic book [[Star Wars: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'']], as well as the ''[[New Jedi Order]]'' series. In the [[Wizards of the Coast]] article ''[[I, Yuuzhan Vong]]'', Embra is the subject of the Adventure Seed: For the Glory of Yun-Yuuzhan! where the players must attack the Hutt's secrect base. ==Appearances== *[[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 1|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 5|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 5]] *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' ==Sources== *{{GamerCite|6|Unusual Suspects}} *{{FactFile|1|YAV 1-6|The Battle of Yavin}} *{{GamerCite|8|I, Yuuzhan Vong}} *{{FactFile|76|BOU 21-24|Bounty Hunters}} *{{FactFile|138|HUT 13-14|Malta the Hutt}} *{{FactFile|140|HUT 15-18|The Hutts}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 15|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 15]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Embra Desilijic |hu=Embra }} [[Category:Desilijic kajidic]] [[Category:Hutts]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Nal Hutta residents]] [[Category:Resistance fighters]]
